title: Deaths in armed conflicts based on where they occurred, 1989-2024
subtitle: Included are deaths of combatants and civilians due to fighting in [armed conflicts](#dod:armed-conflict-ucdp) that were ongoing over that time.
caption: Between 1989 and 2024, the global total of deaths in armed conflicts reached 3.9 million, with the distribution across continents showing significant variation. Africa accounts for the second-highest total at 2.0 million deaths, representing more than half of the global figure. The Middle East follows with 720,000 deaths, while Asia and Oceania record 580,000. Europe shows a total of 370,000 deaths, and the Americas record the lowest regional total at 230,000. The horizontal bars illustrate a steep decline in mortality figures moving from the global aggregate to Africa, and then a further drop to the remaining regions, where values fall below one million.
